common.ignoreText: If you did not expect this message, you can safely ignore it.
common.alternativeText: If the button does not work, open this link:

verify.subject: Verify your email
verify.title: Confirm your email
verify.intro: Please confirm your email address to finish activating your account.

reset.subject: Reset your password
reset.title: Reset your password
reset.intro: Use the button below to choose a new password for your account.
reset.footer: If you requested this, you can continue safely.

emailChange.subject: Confirm your new email
emailChange.title: Confirm your new email
emailChange.intro: Please confirm this new email address to update your account settings.
emailChange.footer: Your email will be changed after confirmation.
